title: nukaworld
description:
A modpack set in the fallout universe with a steampunk feel. 
currently in heavy prerelease stage
body:
![modpacklogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a16198b17a9632351127ca93a270888548387379.png)

**WARNING: This modpack is in a heavy pre-release state. The world is not yet stable. Enter at your own risk.NOTE:TO PLAY THE PACK PROPERLY PLEASE PICK WASTELAND WORLDTYPE**


The bombs have fallen, but humanity endures. Welcome to **Nukaworld**, a new frontier where the iconic wasteland of *NukaCraft* meets the ingenuity of the *Create* mod. Can you rebuild civilization, or will you become another victim of the wastes?

### What is Nukaworld?

*Nukaworld* is a modpack that challenges you to not just survive, but to reinvent. We've brought together the expansive world of *NukaCraft* with the limitless possibilities of *Create* to offer a unique take on the post-apocalyptic experience.

### What to Expect (Now and in the Future):

* **A World of Contrast:** Explore the desolate beauty of the *NukaCraft* wasteland while harnessing the power of *Create*'s contraptions to bring life back to the world.
* **Upcoming Features:**
    * **Custom Structures:** The world will soon be populated with new, hand-crafted locations to discover and loot.
    * **Integrated Crafting:** Look forward to new recipes that will bridge the gap between the mods for a more intuitive crafting experience.
    * **Enhanced Cohesion:** We are working to ensure a seamless integration between all the mods in the pack.

### Your Feedback is Crucial!

This is an early look into the world of *Nukaworld*. We invite you to be a part of its development by reporting any issues you find and sharing your ideas for the future.
